headline: FedEx partner airline says Caribbean service at risk without FAA waiver
summary: A FedEx air cargo contractor says it wants to use bigger aircraft on Caribbean routes, but that FAA rules governing how far the planes can fly over water jeopardize continued service. The post FedEx partner airline says Caribbean service at risk without FAA waiver appeared first on FreightWaves.

raw.headline: FedEx partner airline says Caribbean service at risk without FAA waiver

The post FedEx partner airline says Caribbean service at risk without FAA waiver appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: New Ownership of PostalAnnex in San Jose, California Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Continuing Nearly 30 Years of Service to the Community
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing PostalAnnex location in San Jose, CA to new owners, Nikhil and Ashruti Patel. This location was sold by its original owner, and the ownership transition ensures the community will continue benefiting from the essential Shipping and Office Services this PostalAnnex has provided for nearly 30 years.

raw.headline: New Ownership of PostalAnnex in San Jose, California Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Continuing Nearly 30 Years of Service to the Community

headline: Jim Cramer Highlights FedEx’s New Spin-off
summary: FedEx Corporation (NYSE:FDX) was among the stocks Jim Cramer talked about as he discussed the recent rally in several AI-related stocks.
